# Nitish Gera

> Building apps in Singapore.

Personal site and app portfolio by Nitish Gera.

## Apps

- [Tiny Trips](https://tinytrips.nitish.lol) — AI travel planner for families with toddlers. Enter a destination and children's ages, get a full trip guide in under a minute.
